metadata.name: Respond to a Track Defect Report

description: A track inspector reports a defect (e.g., a broken rail). The dispatcher must protect the area by stopping trains.

nodes.task_description: Receive a report of a broken rail at a specific milepost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the critical defect report.

nodes.task_description: Immediately issue a 'stop' command to all trains currently authorized to operate in that track block.

expected_outcome.value: All affected trains are instructed to stop.

nodes.task_description: Place a block on the affected track segment in the control system to prevent any new authorities from being issued.

expected_outcome.value: The track segment is shown as out-of-service.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a maintenance-of-way crew to the location to repair the defect.

expected_outcome.value: A repair crew is dispatched to the site.
